description: Upplai appears to be an AI application/service with user accounts hosted at `you.uppl.ai`. Its public developer integration surface on this domain is an MCP server that requires OAuth 2.0 access tokens issued by Upplai.
summary: Upplai exposes one OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://upplai-mcp-server-production.up.railway.app/mcp`, using an Upplai OAuth 2.0 authorization server at `https://you.uppl.ai` with scope `mcp:access`.
